scope: Codex CLI provider read-only artifact sandbox hardening
interpretation: Provider CLI sandbox hardening only; not OS/network no-egress enforcement, not official Senior SWE-Bench mastery, and not live provider-loop success evidence.
lineage_constraints: Senior SWE-Bench coding agents must not search GitHub or public solutions.
Provider policy env propagation is observable but not OS/network enforcement.
CLI providers must remain artifact-only and avoid direct repository mutation side effects.
Fresh source-bound a2d.fitness-evidence.v1 actual-test evidence is required before persistence.
focused_regressions: Codex provider args include --sandbox read-only, --ephemeral, --skip-git-repo-check, --ignore-user-config, and --ignore-rules.
Codex provider args no longer include --full-auto or dangerous sandbox/hook bypass flags.
commands: git diff --binary HEAD -- crates | git hash-object --stdin

review.note: Reviewer confirmed local Codex CLI supports the new flags and suggested documenting that read-only sandbox is not a network/no-egress guarantee.
